svg.title: Technology stack diagram
svg.desc: Three zones — Browser (Angular), BFF (.NET 10), and Cloud (Azure) — with dependency arrows flowing left to right.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What Angular 21 features are most important for this BFF SPA — standalone components, signals, defer blocks?')
sendPrompt('Which PrimeNG 21 components are used in the platform and how is theming configured with design tokens?')
sendPrompt('How is Tailwind v4 configured alongside PrimeNG — design tokens, CSS layers, purge config?')
sendPrompt('How does NGRX Signals 21 signalStore differ from classic NGRX store — what is BaseEntityStore built on?')
sendPrompt('Where is Zod 4 used in the Angular app — runtime config validation, API response parsing?')
sendPrompt('What Chart.js 4 chart types are used in the dashboard feature and are they wrapped in Angular components?')
sendPrompt('What .NET 10 features does the BFF use — minimal APIs, AOT, native HTTP/3 support?')
sendPrompt('How is Kestrel configured for HTTPS in development and behind Azure Front Door in production?')
sendPrompt('How is Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.OpenIdConnect configured for the BFF OIDC flow with Entra?')
sendPrompt('How is Serilog 4 configured to emit structured logs to the OTLP collector and App Insights?')
sendPrompt('What Entra ID v2 app registration settings are required for the BFF OIDC Code+PKCE flow?')
sendPrompt('What secrets are stored in Azure Key Vault and how does the BFF access them via Managed Identity?')
sendPrompt('How does the OTLP collector route traces and metrics to App Insights — what exporter is configured?')
